CustomField.formula:
IF(!ISBLANK( Contact__c ), HYPERLINK("https://fimby.force.com/s/contact/"+ Contact__c, Contact__r.FirstName + " " + Contact__r.LastName + IF(Right(Contact__r.LastName, 1)="s", "'", "'s")) + " response", "") +
IF(Contact__c != On_Behalf_Of_Contact__c && !ISBLANK( On_Behalf_Of_Contact__c), " on behalf of " + HYPERLINK("https://fimby.force.com/s/contact/"+ On_Behalf_Of_Contact__c, On_Behalf_Of_Contact__r.FirstName +" " + On_Behalf_Of_Contact__r.LastName), "")
CustomField.label: Response Details
